reviews.review_description:
Webshift: Between Frames is a fun VR horror experience with a strong atmosphere and a series of puzzles to solve as you progress. The studio has clearly put effort into the lighting and sound design, which work together to create a tense and immersive environment.

The game features several well-timed jump scares that will definitely keep horror fans on edge. An interesting mechanic is that each time you die and return to the beginning, you actually learn more about the environment and progress further, turning repetition into part of the gameplay loop.

With its eerie mood, clever progression system, and engaging enigmas to solve, Webshift: Between Frames delivers an enjoyable experience for players who love horror in VR. 🎧🖤
